topIssues: Frame 3: The 'COMPLETE' status badge is truncated with trailing double dots ('COMPLETE ..'), which persists across all completed rows through Frame 12.

Frame 2: In the 'Room trace' console at the bottom, the top log item is vertically clipped/cut off, leaving a messy sliver of text visible. This scroll-clipping artifact repeats in Frames 4, 5, 7, 8, and 10.
Frame 2: The trace logs display raw, unformatted database keys (e.g., 'rc_anthropic__status', 'rc_anthropic__summary') which look unpolished and highly technical for a user-facing UI.
fixSuggestions: Adjust the CSS width, padding, or text-overflow properties of the status badge component to ensure 'COMPLETE' renders cleanly without trailing dots.
Add proper top padding or adjust the scroll-boundary behavior of the 'Room trace' container so that preceding log lines are either fully visible or cleanly hidden instead of being half-clipped.
Parse and map technical variable names in the trace logs to human-readable labels (e.g., change 'rc_anthropic__status' to 'Anthropic Status') to improve readability and visual polish.
